amendment_target: Proposal for a regulation — Article 72 — paragraph 2 — introductory part
body_md:
**Target:** Proposal for a regulation — Article 72 — paragraph 2 — introductory part

## Text proposed by the Commission

2. The following infringements shall be subject to administrative fines of up to 500 000 EUR :

## Amendment of the European Parliament

2. Non compliance with the prohibition of the artificial intelligence practices referred to in Article 5 shall be subject to administrative fines of up to EUR 1 500 000 .
commission_text: 2. The following infringements shall be subject to administrative fines of up to 500 000 EUR :
parliament_text: 2. Non compliance with the prohibition of the artificial intelligence practices referred to in Article 5 shall be subject to administrative fines of up to EUR 1 500 000 .
